title: Malik's Seasons at School
synopsis: Follow Malik through a full year at his preschool as he discovers how nature changes with each season in the school garden.

pages.text: Malik loves going to school! Today is the first day of spring. His teacher, Miss Sara, takes the class outside to the school garden. "Look!" says Malik. "The flowers are waking up!"

illustration.description: A young boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes pointing excitedly at small green shoots and pink tulips emerging from dark soil in a school garden, with other children and a teacher nearby, rendered in soft spring pastels of pink, green, and yellow
illustration.alt: Malik discovering spring flowers in the school garden

pages.text: Pink tulips and yellow daffodils dance in the warm breeze. Malik waters the tiny seedlings with a small watering can. "Grow, little plants!" he whispers. The spring sun feels good on his face.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes carefully watering small green seedlings with a red plastic watering can, surrounded by blooming tulips and daffodils in spring pastel colors

pages.text: Summer comes! The same garden looks different now. The plants Malik watered are big and green. Bright red tomatoes hang heavy on the vines. "We grew these!" Malik says proudly.

illustration.description: The same school garden scene now in bright summer colors, with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes reaching toward large red tomatoes on tall green plants, everything lush and vibrant under brilliant sunshine
illustration.alt: Malik admiring tomatoes in the summer garden

pages.text: Miss Sara helps Malik pick ripe tomatoes. The red fruit is warm from the sun. "This one's perfect!" says Malik, holding up a round, red tomato. Summer makes everything grow big and strong.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding up a bright red tomato with both hands, smiling widely, with his teacher beside him in the abundant summer garden filled with bright greens and vivid colors
illustration.alt: Malik holding a ripe tomato with his teacher

pages.text: Autumn arrives at school! The same garden looks magical now. Orange and red leaves fall like confetti. Malik rakes the colorful leaves into big piles. "Crunch, crunch!" go his feet.

illustration.description: The same garden scene now painted in warm autumn colors, with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes using a small rake to gather orange, red, and yellow leaves, trees with autumn foliage in the background
illustration.alt: Malik raking autumn leaves in the school garden

pages.text: The pumpkins they planted are ready! Big, round, orange pumpkins sit where the tomatoes used to be. "Look how heavy!" Malik says, trying to lift one. Autumn brings different treasures.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes attempting to lift a large orange pumpkin with both arms, surrounded by autumn leaves and other pumpkins in warm orange and brown tones
illustration.alt: Malik trying to lift a heavy pumpkin

pages.text: Winter covers the garden with snow! The same place looks quiet and peaceful now. Malik makes snow angels where the flowers will sleep. "See you in spring!" he calls to the sleeping garden.

illustration.description: The same garden scene transformed by winter, covered in white snow, with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes lying in the snow making snow angels, rendered in cool blues and whites with bare tree branches
illustration.alt: Malik making snow angels in the winter garden

pages.text: All year long, Malik watched his school garden change. Spring brought flowers, summer brought vegetables, autumn brought leaves and pumpkins, and winter brought snow. "I can't wait to see what happens next year!" Malik says, already dreaming of spring.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes standing in the snowy winter garden, looking thoughtful and happy, with faint outlines or memories of the spring, summer, and autumn versions of the same scene visible in soft layers behind him
illustration.alt: Malik in the winter garden dreaming of the seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What did Malik water in the spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Malik watered the tiny seedlings with his watering can to help them grow.

questions.question: What grew big in the summer garden?
questions.explanation: The tomatoes grew big and red in the summer heat, and Malik was proud that he helped grow them.

questions.question: What did Malik rake in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, Malik raked the colorful orange and red leaves that fell from the trees.

questions.question: What covered the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: Winter brought snow that covered the garden, and Malik made snow angels where the flowers would sleep.
